search.query: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select Time as "时间", case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then '扩容' when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then '缩容' else '未变化' end  as "类型",  abs(CurrentReplicas - DesiredReplicas ) as "扩/缩副本数" , RescaleTargetName as "资源名", RescaleTargetKind as "资源类型", CurrentReplicas as "当前副本数", MinReplicas as "最小副本数", MaxReplicas as "最大副本数", HPAName as "HPA名", HPANamespace as "HPA空间", AuditID as "查看详情"    from (select t as Time , cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas,  cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.name') as varchar) as RescaleTargetName, cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.minReplicas') as bigint) as MinReplicas, cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.maxReplicas') as bigint) as MaxReplicas,  cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.kind') as varchar) as RescaleTargetKind, HPAName, HPANamespace, auditID as AuditID   from (SELECT auditID, from_unixtime(__time__ ) as t, requestObject as requestJson, "objectRef.name" as HPAName, "objectRef.namespace" as HPANamespace  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000) HAVING "资源名" is not null  order by time desc limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select Time as "时间", case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then '扩容' when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then '缩容' else '未变化' end  as "类型",  abs(CurrentReplicas - DesiredReplicas ) as "扩/缩副本数" , RescaleTargetName as "资源名", RescaleTargetKind as "资源类型", CurrentReplicas as "当前副本数", MinReplicas as "最小副本数", MaxReplicas as "最大副本数", HPAName as "HPA名", HPANamespace as "HPA空间", AuditID as "查看详情"    from (select t as Time , cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas,  cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.name') as varchar) as RescaleTargetName, cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.spec.minReplicas') as bigint) as MinReplicas, cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.spec.maxReplicas') as bigint) as MaxReplicas,  cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.kind') as varchar) as RescaleTargetKind, HPAName, HPANamespace, auditID as AuditID   from (SELECT auditID, from_unixtime(__time__ ) as t, json_parse(requestObject) as requestJson, "objectRef.name" as HPAName, "objectRef.namespace" as HPANamespace  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000) order by time  limit 10000

search.query: (verb:  update or verb:  patch)  and CronHorizontalPodAutoscaler and responseStatus.code < 400 | select date_format( from_unixtime( to_unixtime( parse_datetime( lastProbeTime, 'YYYY-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ssZ'))), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as time  , case when  arbitrary(current) < arbitrary(desired) then '扩容' when arbitrary(current) > arbitrary(desired) then '缩容' else '未变化' end  as "类型",  abs(arbitrary(current) - arbitrary(desired) ) as "扩/缩副本数" , arbitrary(RescaleTargetKind) as "资源类型", arbitrary(RescaleTargetName) as "资源名",  arbitrary(jobName) as "Job名", arbitrary(current) as "当前", arbitrary(desired) as "目标"    , arbitrary(HPAName) as "HPA名", arbitrary(HPANamespace) as "HPA空间"  from  (select RescaleTargetName, RescaleTargetKind, HPAName, HPANamespace,  regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'jobId":"([^"]+)"', 1) as jobId,  regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'lastProbeTime":"([^"]+)"', 1) as lastProbeTime, regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'state":"([^"]+)"', 1) as state,   regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'cron hpa job (\S+) executed', 1) as jobName, try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'current replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint) as current, try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'desired replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint)  as desired from ( select  cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.name') as varchar) as RescaleTargetName,   cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.kind') as varchar) as RescaleTargetKind, HPAName, HPANamespace, jobDetail   from ( SELECT auditID, from_unixtime(__time__ ) as t, requestObject as requestJson, "objectRef.name" as HPAName, "objectRef.namespace" as HPANamespace  from log  limit 100000) CROSS JOIN UNNEST(regexp_extract_all(requestJson, '("jobId":"[^"]+","lastProbeTime":"[^"]+","message":"cron hpa job \S+ \S+ successfully. current replicas:\d+, desired replicas:\d+","name":"[^"]+","schedule":"[^"]+","state":"Succeed")', 1)) AS t (jobDetail) having jobDetail is not null limit 10000) limit 10000) group by jobId, lastProbeTime order by lastProbeTime desc  limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: (verb:  update or verb:  patch)  and CronHorizontalPodAutoscaler and responseStatus.code < 400 | select date_format( from_unixtime( to_unixtime( parse_datetime( lastProbeTime, 'YYYY-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ssZ'))), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as time  , case when  arbitrary(current) < arbitrary(desired) then '扩容' when arbitrary(current) > arbitrary(desired) then '缩容' else '未变化' end  as "类型",  abs(arbitrary(current) - arbitrary(desired) ) as "扩/缩副本数" , arbitrary(RescaleTargetKind) as "资源类型", arbitrary(RescaleTargetName) as "资源名",  arbitrary(jobName) as "Job名", arbitrary(current) as current, arbitrary(desired) as desired    , arbitrary(HPAName) as "HPA名", arbitrary(HPANamespace) as "HPA空间"  from  (select RescaleTargetName, RescaleTargetKind, HPAName, HPANamespace,  regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'jobId":"([^"]+)"', 1) as jobId,  regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'lastProbeTime":"([^"]+)"', 1) as lastProbeTime, regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'state":"([^"]+)"', 1) as state,   regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'cron hpa job (\S+) executed', 1) as jobName, try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'current replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint) as current, try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'desired replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint)  as desired from ( select  cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.name') as varchar) as RescaleTargetName,   cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.spec.scaleTargetRef.kind') as varchar) as RescaleTargetKind, HPAName, HPANamespace, jobDetail   from ( SELECT auditID, from_unixtime(__time__ ) as t, requestObject as requestJson, "objectRef.name" as HPAName, "objectRef.namespace" as HPANamespace  from log  limit 100000) CROSS JOIN UNNEST(regexp_extract_all(requestJson, '("jobId":"[^"]+","lastProbeTime":"[^"]+","message":"cron hpa job \S+ \S+ successfully. current replicas:\d+, desired replicas:\d+","name":"[^"]+","schedule":"[^"]+","state":"Succeed")', 1)) AS t (jobDetail) having jobDetail is not null limit 10000) limit 10000) group by jobId, lastProbeTime order by lastProbeTime desc  limit 10000

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system  | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, scaleCount as "扩容节点", total as "总节点",  total - scaleCount as "普通节点" from ( select count(DISTINCT  case when "responseObject" like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then "objectRef.name" else '' end) - 1 as scaleCount, count(DISTINCT "objectRef.name") as total,  __time__ - __time__ % 600 as time from log group by time order by time asc limit 10000) order by time asc
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system  | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, scaleCount as "扩容节点", total as "总节点",  total - scaleCount as "普通节点" from ( select count(DISTINCT  case when "responseObject" like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then "objectRef.name" else '' end) - 1 as scaleCount, count(DISTINCT "objectRef.name") as total,  __time__ - __time__ % 600 as time from log group by time order by time asc limit 10000) order by time asc

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, totalCpu as "总CPU", scaleCPU as "扩容CPU", totalCpu - scaleCPU as "普通CPU" from ( select time, sum(cpu) as totalCpu, sum(CASE when resp like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then cpu else 0 end) as scaleCPU from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as node, __time__ - __time__ % 600 as time, arbitrary("responseObject") as resp, cast(arbitrary("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpu from log group by node, time  limit 100000) group by time  limit 10000) order by time asc limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, totalCpu as "总CPU", scaleCPU as "扩容CPU", totalCpu - scaleCPU as "普通CPU" from ( select time, sum(cpu) as totalCpu, sum(CASE when resp like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then cpu else 0 end) as scaleCPU from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as node, __time__ - __time__ % 1800 as time, arbitrary("responseObject") as resp, cast(arbitrary("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpu from log group by node, time  limit 100000) group by time  limit 10000) order by time asc limit 10000

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalCPUDiff[1] as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, totalCPUSecDiff[1] as totalCPUSec, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalCPUDiff[1] as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, totalCPUSecDiff[1] as totalCPUSec, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, case when totalCPUDiff[1] is null then 0 else totalCPUDiff[1] end  as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, totalCPUSecDiff[1] as totalCPUSec, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalCPUDiff[1] as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, totalCPUSecDiff[1] as totalCPUSec, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalCPUDiff[1] as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, round(case when  totalCPUSecDiff[1] is null then 0 else totalCPUSecDiff[1] end  / 3600.0, 2) as totalCPUHour, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUHourDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalCPUDiff[1] as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, round( totalCPUSecDiff[1] / 3600.0, 2) as totalCPUHour, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUHourDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and   ((verb : delete )  or (objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and responseObject: "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" )  ) | SELECT date_format(time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", name as "节点", cpuCore as "CPU核数" from (  SELECT name as name, sum(case when verb = 'delete' then 1 else 0 end) as delta, sum(case when responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then 1 else 0 end) as scaler, max(case when verb = 'patch' then cpuCore else 0 end) as cpuCore, max(case when verb = 'delete' then time else 0 end) as time  from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as name, verb, arbitrary(responseObject) as responseObject, cast( max ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpuCore, arbitrary(__time__) as time  from log group by name, verb having (responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' or verb = 'delete')  limit 10000 ) group by name having scaler > 0 and time > 0 ) order by "时间" desc
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and   ((verb : delete )  or (objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system )  ) | SELECT date_format(time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", name as "NodeName", cpuCore as "CPU核数" from (  SELECT name as name, sum(case when verb = 'delete' then 1 else 0 end) as delta, sum(case when responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then 1 else 0 end) as scaler, max(case when verb = 'patch' then cpuCore else 0 end) as cpuCore, max(case when verb = 'delete' then time else 0 end) as time  from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as name, verb, arbitrary(responseObject) as responseObject, cast( max ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpuCore, arbitrary(__time__) as time  from log group by name, verb having (responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' or verb = 'delete')  limit 10000 ) group by name having scaler > 0 )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" | SELECT date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", "objectRef.name" as "节点", "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu" as  "CPU核数" from log order by "时间" desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" | SELECT date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", "objectRef.name" as "节点", "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu" as  "CPU核数" from log order by "时间" desc limit 1000

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler  |  select split(b, '$#$') [1] as node, split(b, '$#$') [1] as node1, split(b, '$#$') [2] as time  from ( SELECT   ARRAY[ concat( "objectRef.name",  '$#$', date_format(max(__time__) + 30, '%m-%d %H:%i')),  concat( "objectRef.name",  '$#$', date_format(min(__time__) - 30, '%m-%d %H:%i'))]   as e   from log GROUP  by "objectRef.name"  limit 1000 ) t, unnest(e) as x(b)  order by time asc
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler  |  select split(b, '$#$') [1] as node, split(b, '$#$') [1] as node1, split(b, '$#$') [2] as time  from ( SELECT   ARRAY[ concat( "objectRef.name",  '$#$', date_format(max(__time__) + 30, '%m-%d %H:%i')),  concat( "objectRef.name",  '$#$', date_format(min(__time__) - 30, '%m-%d %H:%i'))]   as e   from log GROUP  by "objectRef.name"  limit 1000 ) t, unnest(e) as x(b)  order by time asc

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" | select date_format(t, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, diff[1] as "今天", diff[2] as "昨天", diff[3] as "上周" from  (  SELECT t, ts_compare("节点数", 86400, 604800) as diff from ( SELECT date_parse("时间", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as t, "节点数", "CPU核数" from (   select time_series(__time__, '10m', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S', '0')  as "时间", count(DISTINCT  "objectRef.name" ) as "节点数" , sum( cast ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu" as bigint) )  as  "CPU核数" from log group by "时间" order by "时间"  limit 1000 )    ) group by t having t is not null ) order by time asc
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" | select date_format(t, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, diff[1] as "今天", diff[2] as "昨天", diff[3] as "上周" from  (  SELECT t, ts_compare("节点数", 86400, 604800) as diff from ( SELECT date_parse("时间", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as t, "节点数", "CPU核数" from (   select time_series(__time__, '1h', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S', '0')  as "时间", count(DISTINCT  "objectRef.name" ) as "节点数" , sum( cast ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu" as bigint) )  as  "CPU核数" from log group by "时间" order by "时间" desc limit 1000 )    ) group by t having t is not null ) order by time asc

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" | select date_format(t, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, diff[1] as "今天", diff[2] as "昨天", diff[3] as "上周" from  (  SELECT t, ts_compare("CPU核数", 86400, 604800) as diff from ( SELECT date_parse("时间", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as t, "节点数", "CPU核数" from (   select time_series(__time__, '10m', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S', '0')  as "时间", count(DISTINCT  "objectRef.name" ) as "节点数" , sum( cast ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu" as bigint) )  as  "CPU核数" from log group by "时间" order by "时间"  limit 1000 )    ) group by t having t is not null ) order by time asc
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" | select date_format(t, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, diff[1] as "今天", diff[2] as "昨天", diff[3] as "上周" from  (  SELECT t, ts_compare("CPU核数", 86400, 604800) as diff from ( SELECT date_parse("时间", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as t, "节点数", "CPU核数" from (   select time_series(__time__, '1h', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S', '0')  as "时间", count(DISTINCT  "objectRef.name" ) as "节点数" , sum( cast ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu" as bigint) )  as  "CPU核数" from log group by "时间" order by "时间" desc limit 1000 )    ) group by t having t is not null ) order by time asc

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler and responseObject:gpu  | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalGPUDiff[1] as totalGPU, (totalGPUDiff[1] - totalGPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUDiff[2] as totalGPUDelta, totalGPUSecDiff[1] as totalGPUSec, (totalGPUSecDiff[1] - totalGPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUSecDiff[2] as totalGPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalGPU, 604800) as totalGPUDiff, compare(totalGPUSec, 604800) as totalGPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(gpuCore) as totalGPU, sum(gpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalGPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia\.com/gpu":"(\d+)', 1) , __time__) as bigint) as gpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler and responseObject:gpu  | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalGPUDiff[1] as totalGPU, (totalGPUDiff[1] - totalGPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUDiff[2] as totalGPUDelta, totalGPUSecDiff[1] as totalGPUSec, (totalGPUSecDiff[1] - totalGPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUSecDiff[2] as totalGPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalGPU, 604800) as totalGPUDiff, compare(totalGPUSec, 604800) as totalGPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(gpuCore) as totalGPU, sum(gpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalGPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia\.com/gpu":"(\d+)', 1) , __time__) as bigint) as gpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler and responseObject:gpu  | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, case when totalGPUDiff[1] is null then  0 else totalGPUDiff[1] end as totalGPU, (totalGPUDiff[1] - totalGPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUDiff[2] as totalGPUDelta, totalGPUSecDiff[1] as totalGPUSec, (totalGPUSecDiff[1] - totalGPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUSecDiff[2] as totalGPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalGPU, 604800) as totalGPUDiff, compare(totalGPUSec, 604800) as totalGPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(gpuCore) as totalGPU, sum(gpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalGPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia\.com/gpu":"(\d+)', 1) , __time__) as bigint) as gpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler and responseObject:gpu  | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalGPUDiff[1] as totalGPU, (totalGPUDiff[1] - totalGPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUDiff[2] as totalGPUDelta,  round(case when  totalGPUSecDiff[1] is null then 0 else totalGPUSecDiff[1] end /3600.0, 3) as totalGPUSec, (totalGPUSecDiff[1] - totalGPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUSecDiff[2] as totalGPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalGPU, 604800) as totalGPUDiff, compare(totalGPUSec, 604800) as totalGPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(gpuCore) as totalGPU, sum(gpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalGPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia\.com/gpu":"(\d+)', 1) , __time__) as bigint) as gpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler and responseObject:gpu  | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalGPUDiff[1] as totalGPU, (totalGPUDiff[1] - totalGPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUDiff[2] as totalGPUDelta, round(totalGPUSecDiff[1]/3600.0, 3) as totalGPUSec, (totalGPUSecDiff[1] - totalGPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalGPUSecDiff[2] as totalGPUSecDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalGPU, 604800) as totalGPUDiff, compare(totalGPUSec, 604800) as totalGPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(gpuCore) as totalGPU, sum(gpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalGPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia\.com/gpu":"(\d+)', 1) , __time__) as bigint) as gpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers"  and objectRef.subresource:  status | SELECT  DISTINCT "objectRef.namespace" as ns
objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers"  and objectRef.subresource:  status | SELECT  DISTINCT "objectRef.name" as name

(verb:  update or verb:  patch)  and CronHorizontalPodAutoscaler and responseStatus.code < 400 |  select sum(total) as total from ( select  case when  arbitrary(current) < arbitrary(desired) then '扩容' when arbitrary(current) > arbitrary(desired) then '缩容' else '未变化' end  as "类型",  abs(arbitrary(current) - arbitrary(desired) ) as total  from  (select regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'jobId":"([^"]+)"', 1) as jobId,  regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'lastProbeTime":"([^"]+)"', 1) as lastProbeTime,  try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'current replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint) as current, try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'desired replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint)  as desired from ( select  jobDetail   from ( SELECT  from_unixtime(__time__ ) as t, requestObject as requestJson from log  limit 100000) CROSS JOIN UNNEST(regexp_extract_all(requestJson, '("jobId":"[^"]+","lastProbeTime":"[^"]+","message":"cron hpa job \S+ \S+ successfully. current replicas:\d+, desired replicas:\d+","name":"[^"]+","schedule":"[^"]+","state":"Succeed")', 1)) AS t (jobDetail) having jobDetail is not null limit 10000) limit 10000) group by jobId, lastProbeTime having "类型" = '扩容' order by lastProbeTime desc  limit 10000)
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select  diff[1] as total, (diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2] as delta from( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from( select sum( case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then 1 when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then 0 else 0 end)  as total from (select cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas from (SELECT json_parse(requestObject) as requestJson  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000)))

search.query: (verb:  update or verb:  patch)  and CronHorizontalPodAutoscaler and responseStatus.code < 400 |  select sum(total) as total from ( select  case when  arbitrary(current) < arbitrary(desired) then '扩容' when arbitrary(current) > arbitrary(desired) then '缩容' else '未变化' end  as "类型",  abs(arbitrary(current) - arbitrary(desired) ) as total  from  (select regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'jobId":"([^"]+)"', 1) as jobId,  regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'lastProbeTime":"([^"]+)"', 1) as lastProbeTime,  try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'current replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint) as current, try_cast(regexp_extract(jobDetail, 'desired replicas:(\d+)', 1) as bigint)  as desired from ( select  jobDetail   from ( SELECT  from_unixtime(__time__ ) as t, requestObject as requestJson from log  limit 100000) CROSS JOIN UNNEST(regexp_extract_all(requestJson, '("jobId":"[^"]+","lastProbeTime":"[^"]+","message":"cron hpa job \S+ \S+ successfully. current replicas:\d+, desired replicas:\d+","name":"[^"]+","schedule":"[^"]+","state":"Succeed")', 1)) AS t (jobDetail) having jobDetail is not null limit 10000) limit 10000) group by jobId, lastProbeTime having "类型" = '缩容' order by lastProbeTime desc  limit 10000)
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select  diff[1] as total, (diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2] as delta from( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from( select sum( case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then 1 when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then 0 else 0 end)  as total from (select cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas from (SELECT json_parse(requestObject) as requestJson  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000)))

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and   ((verb : delete )  or (objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and responseObject: "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" )  ) | select diff[1] as total, (diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2] as delta  from ( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from ( SELECT count(1) as total from (  SELECT name as name, sum(case when verb = 'delete' then 1 else 0 end) as delta, sum(case when responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then 1 else 0 end) as scaler, max(case when verb = 'patch' then cpuCore else 0 end) as cpuCore, max(case when verb = 'delete' then time else 0 end) as time  from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as name, verb, arbitrary(responseObject) as responseObject, cast( max ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpuCore, arbitrary(__time__) as time  from log group by name, verb having (responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' or verb = 'delete')  limit 10000 ) group by name having scaler > 0 and delta > 0 ) ) )
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalCPUDiff[1] as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, round( totalCPUSecDiff[1] / 3600.0, 2) as totalCPUHour, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUHourDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and   ((verb : delete )  or (objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and responseObject: "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" and responseObject:"gpu" )  ) | select diff[1] as total, (diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2] as delta  from ( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from ( SELECT count(1) as total from (  SELECT name as name, sum(case when verb = 'delete' then 1 else 0 end) as delta, sum(case when (responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' and responseObject like '%nvidia.com/gpu%') then 1 else 0 end) as scaler, max(case when verb = 'patch' then cpuCore else 0 end) as cpuCore, max(case when verb = 'delete' then time else 0 end) as time  from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as name, verb, arbitrary(responseObject) as responseObject, cast( max ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpuCore, arbitrary(__time__) as time  from log group by name, verb having (responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' or verb = 'delete')  limit 10000 ) group by name having scaler > 0 and delta > 0 ) ) )
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler | select totalNodeDiff[1] as totalNode, (totalNodeDiff[1] - totalNodeDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalNodeDiff[2] as totalNodeDelta, totalCPUDiff[1] as totalCPU, (totalCPUDiff[1] - totalCPUDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUDiff[2] as totalCPUDelta, round( totalCPUSecDiff[1] / 3600.0, 2) as totalCPUHour, (totalCPUSecDiff[1] - totalCPUSecDiff[2]) * 100.0 / totalCPUSecDiff[2] as totalCPUHourDelta from  ( select compare(totalNode, 604800) as totalNodeDiff, compare(totalCPU, 604800) as totalCPUDiff, compare(totalCPUSec, 604800) as totalCPUSecDiff from ( select count(1) as totalNode, sum(cpuCore) as totalCPU, sum(cpuCore * runTimeSec) as totalCPUSec from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as nodeName, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, max(__time__) - min(__time__) + 60 as  runTimeSec  from log GROUP  by nodeName limit 1000 ) ) )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" and responseObject:"gpu" | SELECT date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", "objectRef.name" as "节点", regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia_count":"([^"]+)', 1) as  "GPU卡数", regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia_name":"([^"]+)', 1) as  "型号" from log order by "时间" desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and responseStatus.code < 400 and  verb:create and responseObject : "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" | SELECT date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", "objectRef.name" as "节点", "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu" as  "CPU核数" from log order by "时间" desc limit 1000

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and   ((verb : delete )  or (objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and responseObject: "k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler" and responseObject : gpu )  ) | SELECT date_format(time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", name as "节点", gpuCore as "GPU卡数" from (  SELECT name as name, sum(case when verb = 'delete' then 1 else 0 end) as delta, sum(case when responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then 1 else 0 end) as scaler, max(case when verb = 'patch' then gpuCore else 0 end) as gpuCore, max(case when verb = 'delete' then time else 0 end) as time  from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as name, verb, arbitrary(responseObject) as responseObject, cast( max (regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia\.com/gpu":"(\d+)', 1) ) as bigint) as gpuCore, arbitrary(__time__) as time  from log group by name, verb having (responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' or verb = 'delete')  limit 10000 ) group by name having scaler > 0 and time > 0 ) order by "时间" desc
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and   ((verb : delete )  or (objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system )  ) | SELECT date_format(time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as "时间", name as "NodeName", cpuCore as "CPU核数" from (  SELECT name as name, sum(case when verb = 'delete' then 1 else 0 end) as delta, sum(case when responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then 1 else 0 end) as scaler, max(case when verb = 'patch' then cpuCore else 0 end) as cpuCore, max(case when verb = 'delete' then time else 0 end) as time  from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as name, verb, arbitrary(responseObject) as responseObject, cast( max ("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpuCore, arbitrary(__time__) as time  from log group by name, verb having (responseObject like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' or verb = 'delete')  limit 10000 ) group by name having scaler > 0 )

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, round(totalCpu  / 3600.0, 2) as "总CPU/小时", round(scaleCPU  / 3600.0, 2) as "扩容CPU/小时", round((totalCpu - scaleCPU)  / 3600.0, 2) as "普通CPU/小时" from ( select time, sum(cpu* runSeconds ) as totalCpu, sum(CASE when resp like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then cpu * runSeconds else 0 end) as scaleCPU from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as node, __time__ - __time__ % 600 as time, arbitrary("responseObject") as resp, cast(arbitrary("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpu, max(__time__) - min(__time__) as runSeconds from log group by node, time  limit 100000) group by time  limit 10000) order by time asc limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, totalCpu as "总CPU", scaleCPU as "扩容CPU", totalCpu - scaleCPU as "普通CPU" from ( select time, sum(cpu) as totalCpu, sum(CASE when resp like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then cpu else 0 end) as scaleCPU from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as node, __time__ - __time__ % 1800 as time, arbitrary("responseObject") as resp, cast(arbitrary("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpu from log group by node, time  limit 100000) group by time  limit 10000) order by time asc limit 10000

display.displayName: 扩容内存运行时间趋势

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, round(totalCpu / 1024/1024  / 3600.0, 2) as "总内存（GB）/小时", round(scaleCPU  / 1024/1024  / 3600.0, 2) as "扩容内存（GB）/小时", round((totalCpu - scaleCPU)  / 1024/1024  / 3600.0, 2) as "普通内存（GB）/小时" from ( select time, sum(cpu* runSeconds ) as totalCpu, sum(CASE when resp like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then cpu * runSeconds else 0 end) as scaleCPU from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as node, __time__ - __time__ % 600 as time, arbitrary("responseObject") as resp, cast(regexp_extract( arbitrary("responseObject.status.allocatable.memory"), '(\d+)', 1) as bigint) as cpu, max(__time__) - min(__time__) as runSeconds from log group by node, time  limit 100000) group by time  limit 10000) order by time asc limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system | select date_format(time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, totalCpu as "总CPU", scaleCPU as "扩容CPU", totalCpu - scaleCPU as "普通CPU" from ( select time, sum(cpu) as totalCpu, sum(CASE when resp like '%k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler%' then cpu else 0 end) as scaleCPU from ( SELECT "objectRef.name" as node, __time__ - __time__ % 1800 as time, arbitrary("responseObject") as resp, cast(arbitrary("responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu") as bigint) as cpu from log group by node, time  limit 100000) group by time  limit 10000) order by time asc limit 10000

search.query: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select  case when diff[1] is null then 0 else diff[1] end  as total, round((diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2], 2) as delta from( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from( select sum( case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then DesiredReplicas - CurrentReplicas when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then 0 else 0 end)  as total from (select cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas from (SELECT requestObject as requestJson  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000)))
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select  diff[1] as total, (diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2] as delta from( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from( select sum( case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then 1 when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then 0 else 0 end)  as total from (select cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas from (SELECT json_parse(requestObject) as requestJson  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000)))

search.query: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select  case when diff[1] is null then 0 else diff[1] end  as total, round((diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2], 2) as delta from( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from( select sum( case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then 0 when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then CurrentReplicas - DesiredReplicas  else 0 end)  as total from (select cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract_scalar(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas from (SELECT requestObject as requestJson  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000)))
search.tokenQuery: objectRef.resource : "horizontalpodautoscalers" and verb:  update and  "SucceededRescale"   | select  diff[1] as total, (diff[1] - diff[2]) * 100.0 / diff[2] as delta from( select compare(total, 604800) as diff from( select sum( case when  CurrentReplicas < DesiredReplicas then 1 when CurrentReplicas > DesiredReplicas then 0 else 0 end)  as total from (select cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.currentReplicas') as bigint) as CurrentReplicas, cast (json_extract(requestJson, '$.status.desiredReplicas') as bigint) as DesiredReplicas from (SELECT json_parse(requestObject) as requestJson  from log  limit 100000) limit 100000)))

display.markdownStr: <center><font color=gree size=4>当前扩容出的节点数：${total} ，总CPU核心数：${cpu}，总GPU卡数：${gpu}，总内存：${mem}GB</font></center>

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system and  responseObject: k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler  | SELECT count(1) as total, CASE when  sum(cpucore) is null then 0 else sum(cpucore) end  as cpu, CASE when  sum(gpucore) is null then 0 else sum(gpucore) end as gpu, round( sum(mem/ 1024.0 / 1024), 1) as mem    from ( select "objectRef.name" as name, cast( max_by( regexp_extract(responseObject, 'nvidia\.com/gpu":"(\d+)', 1) , __time__) as bigint) as gpuCore, cast( max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as bigint) as cpuCore, cast(regexp_extract( arbitrary("responseObject.status.allocatable.memory"), '(\d+)', 1) as bigint) as mem from log GROUP by name limit 1000 )
